data.title: ROHM introduces LDO regulators with 500mA output, enabling stable operation with ultra-small capacitors for high-current applications.
data.description: Enhances Options for High-Current Applications by Offering Increased Design Flexibility.

data.title: Stock Yards Bancorp & Field & Main Bancorp to merge, expanding into Western KY marketplace.
data.description: A renowned stock yard is set to broaden its presence into the promising market of Western Kentucky. The move comes as part of the company's expansion strategy to tap into the potential of the region, known for its thriving economy and robust agricultural industry. With an increase in demand for livestock and related services in the area, the stock yard aims to leverage this opportunity for growth. This decision aligns with the company's objectives to enhance its market share and capitalize on new business avenues. The expansion into Western Kentucky signifies a significant milestone for the stock yard, highlighting its commitment to catering to the needs of customers in the region. This strategic investment is anticipated to bring substantial benefits, with projections indicating a considerable uptick in revenue and market outreach. The move underscores the company's proactive approach to staying ahead in the competitive livestock market, indicating a positive trajectory for its future prospects. Grabbing a foothold in the Western Kentucky marketplace is expected to drive growth and success for the stock yard, as it positions itself as a key player in the flourishing regional market.

data.title: Shareholders of New Gold overwhelmingly support plan with Coeur Mining. Meetings held in TORONTO on Jan. 27, 2026.Important numbers: TSX: NGD, NYSE American: NGD.
data.description: In Toronto on January 27, 2026, New Gold Inc. ("New Gold" or the "Company") received shareholder approval for a Plan of Arrangement. The approval came at a special meeting attended by stakeholders. New Gold Inc., listed on TSX as NGD and NYSE American as NGD, indicated satisfaction with the outcome of the meeting.

data.title: Finning to report Q4 and annual 2025 results on Feb 10, hold investor call on Feb 11, 2026. Call at 10:00 AM ET. Phone 1-833-752-3398 or 1-647-846-2852. Webcast available on website.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, Finning International Inc. (TSX: FTT) announced that they will be releasing their Q4 and annual 2025 financial results on February 10, 2026 after the market closes. An investor call has been scheduled for February 11, 2026 at 10:00 AM Eastern Time. For those interested in participating, they can dial 1-833-752-3398 (Canada and US toll free) or 1-647-846-2852 (international toll). The call will also be available via live webcast and will be archived for three months. Interested individuals can visit the company's website to access the webcast and presentation.

data.title: Dreame Technology presents futuristic home ecosystem with robotic autonomy and AI at "Beyond Smart" event in Silicon Valley.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, in San Francisco, Dreame Technology, a top player in premium consumer electronics and smart manufacturing, unveiled its innovative 2026 home appliance range at the "Beyond Smart" gathering in Silicon Valley. This event celebrated the company's groundbreaking advancements.

data.title: AES to hold conference call on Feb 27, 2026, to review Q4 & full year 2025 financial results at 10:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: A conference call hosted by The AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) is scheduled for Friday, February 27, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The call aims to discuss the financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. Prepared remarks will be presented, followed by a Q&A session.

data.title: Stifel announces 3-for-2 stock split, 11% common dividend hike, and preferred stock cash dividend, marking ninth annual increase.
data.description: This marks the ninth straight year of dividend growth for shareholders.

data.title: First Horizon Corp (NYSE: FHN) declares $0.17 per share cash dividend on common stock; payable on April 1, 2026.
data.description: First Horizon Corporation, based in Memphis, Tennessee, revealed on January 27, 2026, that their board of directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.17 per share for FHN's common stock. This dividend will be distributed on April 1, 2026, to shareholders who are recorded as such...

data.title: Alpine Banks of Colorado exchanges up to 800,000 Class A shares for Class B shares on a one-for-one basis.
data.description: In Glenwood Springs, Colorado, on Jan. 27, 2026, Alpine Banks of Colorado (OTCQX: ALPIB) disclosed outcomes of its recent exchange offer. The company, overseeing Alpine Bank, allowed for a swap of up to 800,000 Class A common stock shares for newly-created Class B common stock shares on a one-to-one ratio. Equiniti Trust Company LLC, acting as the exchange agent for the offer, supported the process.

data.title: Planet Labs PBC will announce Q4 and full year 2025 results on March 19, 2026, after market close. Conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET.
data.description: In San Francisco, Planet Labs PBC (NYSE:PL) revealed its fiscal fourth quarter and full year 2026 financial results for the period ending January 31, 2026. The announcement was made after market close on March 19, 2026. A conference call led by Planet’s management to review the financial results and business outlook is scheduled for 5:00 p.m. ET / 2:00 p.m. PT on the same day. Planet encourages participation in the conference call for further insights.

data.title: Texas Instruments, despite slight Q4 miss, guides above for Q1 with stock rising; post-quarter gains noted.
data.description: Texas Instruments reported fourth-quarter results that fell slightly below estimates, with earnings and revenue slightly missing expectations. However, the company provided guidance for the current period that surpassed analyst views. This news caused TXN stock to increase. After posting roughly in-line results for Q4, Texas Instruments guided above estimates for Q1. This information was presented in an article on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Intellia Therapeutics stock surged after FDA approval to restart gene-editing study.
data.description: Intellia Therapeutics experienced a significant increase in their stock value on Tuesday following an announcement from the FDA permitting the company to resume a gene-editing study. This development caused a surge in the beleaguered company's stock, reflecting renewed investor confidence.

data.title: Pinterest stock drops after company announces cutting nearly 15% of workforce to prioritize AI development.
data.description: Pinterest's stock experienced a decline following the announcement of the company's decision to reduce its workforce by approximately 15%. The move is part of Pinterest's strategy to reallocate resources towards Artificial Intelligence (AI) initiatives. The restructuring aims to enhance the company's focus on AI technologies.

data.title: Space Asset Acquisition Corp. priced $200M IPO with 20M units at $10/unit, trading on Nasdaq with ticker symbol “SAAQU” on Jan. 28, 2026.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, Space Asset Acquisition Corp. revealed the pricing details of their initial public offering, consisting of 20,000,000 units priced at $10.00 per unit. These units are scheduled to start trading on January 28, 2026, on The Nasdaq Global Market under the ticker symbol "SAAQU."

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow drops 400 points, S&P 500 at record high, Reddit suffers losses. Live coverage updates.
data.description: Today in the stock market, the S&P 500 reached a record high, closing at a new level. Conversely, small cap stocks did not perform as well. Reddit experienced significant losses. The Dow Jones Industrial Average dropped by 400 points due to UnitedHealth's decline, while the S&P 500 achieved a new record. This news was covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: GCC, S.A.B. de C.V. reports Q4 and full year 2025 results; a leading cement supplier in US & Mexico.
data.description: In Chihuahua, Mexico on January 27, 2026, GCC, S.A.B. de C.V. (BMV: GCC*) revealed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The company, known for its supply and production of cement, aggregates, and concrete in the United States and Mexico, reported its earnings for this period.

data.title: CMC (NYSE: CMC) named on Corporate Knights' 2026 Global 100 Most Sustainable Corporations list for the first time.
data.description: In Irving, Texas on January 27, 2026, CMC (NYSE: CMC) revealed their inclusion in Corporate Knights' 2026 Global 100 Most Sustainable Corporations list. This is the first time CMC has appeared on this esteemed list, which is released by Corporate Knights on a yearly basis. The company's recognition underscores its commitment to sustainability and responsible business practices.

data.title: F5 stock (NASDAQ: FFIV) rallies post Q1 earnings beat. Earnings: $4.45 per share vs $3.65 est. Revenue: $822.47M vs $758.08M est.
data.description: After F5, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIV) released its first quarter earnings report, the company saw an increase in shares during extended trading on Tuesday. The report exceeded expectations in both top and bottom-line figures. In particular, F5 reported earnings of $4.45 per share, surpassing the analyst consensus estimate of $3.65 by 21.88%. Additionally, quarterly revenue reached $822.47 million, outperforming the Street estimate of $758.08 million. A notable highlight from the quarter was the 37% growth in systems revenue to $218 million. For more details on this news, visit Benzinga.com. FFIV stock is currently in motion, making it worthwhile to monitor the price action.

data.title: Comerica Bank starts 11th North Texas Prom Dress Drive on Feb 2. Donations at 7 centers.
data.description: In February, Comerica Bank in Dallas will be organizing its 11th annual North Texas Prom Dress Drive. The initiative invites the community to donate new or gently used formal dresses and accessories such as shoes, purses, and jewelry at seven designated banking centers. The event aims to collect outfits to support individuals attending prom.

data.title: Justin Shubow appointed chairman of Beautifying Transportation Infrastructure Council by U.S. Secretary of Transportation Sean Duffy. Jan. 27, 2026.
data.description: In Washington on January 27, 2026, Sean Duffy, the U.S. Secretary of Transportation, announced the appointment of Justin Shubow, the president of the National Civic Art Society, as the chairman of the newly established Beautifying Transportation Infrastructure Council. This council, a first of its kind, aims to enhance the aesthetic appeal of transportation infrastructure across the country. This move signifies a strategic effort by the U.S. Department of Transportation to prioritize the visual aspect of transportation development.
